subcodes.first_line: These are the days the like of which the eye of creation hath never seen, nor hath any among contingent beings perceived their likeness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این ایام ایامیست که چشم امکان شبه آن ندیده و احدی از ممکنات مثل آن ادراک ننموده
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
